description: Dubb is a video sales platform for recording, sharing, and tracking personalized videos across email, SMS, and LinkedIn, with landing pages and CRM integrations.
overview: Dubb lets sales teams record and share personalized videos with instant landing pages, track engagement in real time, and send across email, SMS, and social, with CRM sync.
what_is: Dubb is an AI-assisted video sales platform. Reps record videos, share them on instant landing pages, and track who watches, combining video messaging with email and SMS campaigns in one place to make outreach more personal.

It suits sales, real estate, coaching, and finance professionals who want to engage clients visually. Personalized video can be sent right away across email, social, SMS, and LinkedIn, and tends to lift trust and replies.
Dubb integrates with CRMs and marketing tools to automate workflows and capture engagement data. It adds video to the sales stack rather than replacing a CRM, and it is not a project-management tool.
